name: io.github.arcededev/air-sdk
title: AIR SDK
description: Collective intelligence for browser automation agents. Discover what actions are possible on any website, get verified CSS selectors and execution plans, extract structured data from URLs, and report outcomes to improve the network. Up to 7,000x cost reduction vs LLM DOM reasoning.

environmentVariables.name: AIR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from agentinternetruntime.com/dashboard — free tier includes 1,000 executions/month
